name: dam_combat_guard6_rngseedlock
description: dam_combat_guard6 with the PRNG SEED-LOCKED on both sides (FID-0063): g_randomSeed is scripted to the same value at the same gameplay frame (40, pre-motion; motion onset is frame 80) via GE007_AUTO_RNG_SEED_SCRIPT (native, applied at the input poll that opens frame 40) and MGB64_ARES_RNG_SEED_SCRIPT (stock, applied at the first VI sample of gameplay frame 40). This removes the seed-VALUE confound of the natural route (different boot seeds mean value-dependent consumers legitimately reschedule draws), so per-tick randomGetNext() call counts AND end-of-tick seeds are directly comparable: after the lock, tools/fidelity/rng_callcount_diff.py's seeds_match column is TRUE while and only while the two sides have made the same number of calls since the lock. Analysis step: rng_callcount_diff.py --native <native>.jsonl --stock <stock>.jsonl.
